option.name: filePath
option.value: /MainActivity (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
name: Android CI
on: push: branches: [ "main" ] pull_request: branches: [ "main" ]
jobs: build: runs-on: ubuntu-latest
steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: set up JDK 17 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: java-version: '17' distribution: 'temurin' cache: gradle
- name: Grant execute permission for gradlew run: chmod +x gradlew
- name: Build with Gradle run: ./gradlew assembleDebug
- name: Upload APK uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: app-debug path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
package com.example.remote_tv.data.model
data class AppSettings( val themeMode: AppThemeMode = AppThemeMode.DARK, val languageCode: String = "en", val autoReconnectLastDevice: Boolean = true, val autoScanOnCastTab: Boolean = true, val keepScreenOn: Boolean = false, )

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
package com.example.remote_tv.data.model
data class AppSettings( val themeMode: AppThemeMode = AppThemeMode.DARK, val languageCode: String = "vi", val autoReconnectLastDevice: Boolean = true, val autoScanOnCastTab: Boolean = true, val keepScreenOn: Boolean = false, )

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources>
<style name="Theme.REMOTE_TV" parent="android:Theme.Material.Light.NoActionBar" /> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources>
<style name="Theme.REMOTE_TV" parent="Theme.AppCompat.Light.NoActionBar" /> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
